description: Full reassessment of all phase2 flags across the corpus. Excluded: XREF terms, MTI-excluded terms, term_inv id 16. Includes inserts for newly warranted flags, deletes for no-longer-valid flags, and field sync updates for somatic_link and god_as_subject.
